channel.title: network on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in network on William Fang

item.title: Unix Network Programming 代码学习
item.description: 网络编程的圣经 Chap.0 安装源代码 安装步骤 ## git clone git@github.com:williamlfang/unix-network-programming-v3.git cd unix-network-programming-v3-master ./configure cd lib # build the basic library that all programs need make # use "gmake" everywhere on BSD/OS systems cd ../libfree # continue building the basic library make 测试 ## 编译 cd intro make ## 启动服务器 sudo ./daytimetcpsrv ## 运
